title: Avaritia Furnace
description: An incredible furnace in Avaritia Style
body:
Avaritia Furnace by inzhefop
(Available in 1.12.2, 1.14.2, 1.15.2, 1.16.5)

The Avaritia Furnace mod adds an Infinity Furnace to minecraft in the well known Avaritia Mod style. But not needs the Avaritia Mod installed and is standalone.

Avaritia Furnace

The Avaritia Furnace is the Main Part of the Mod. It consumes no fuel. The Furnace can duplicate the smelted items but the smelting time increases significantly. So theoretically you can get an enormous amount but you have to wait longer then you life. To configure this you can change the Mode. Mode 1 smelts 1 item in 1 tick. Mode 2 1 item in 4 Ticks and so on. But to achieve this you need to craft Infinity Fuel.


Fuel Compressor

The Fuel Compressor compresses items with a burn time to Infinity Fuel used to craft the Infinity Furnace. You'll need Fuel in a value of 1 billion Burn ticks to get 1 Infinity Fuel. You can also insert Lava. (1000mb equals 16.000 ticks or 1 Coal-Block). So it's a bit easier to
 get the Furnace.


Compressed Furnaces

The Compressed, Double and Triple Compressed Furnaces are only crafting ingredients for the Avaritia Furnace. They can be crafted with an Iron/Gold/Diamond-Block in a cycle of the last level furnace.
